post.summary: Send a message to a profile
post.description: Stores a user message and triggers the AI workflow to generate a reply.

text.example: Here is the information you requested.

put.summary: Update the data field of a profile

profile_id.description: Profile ID (optional, will use first active profile if not provided)

400.description: User already has an active voice or no active profile found.

post.summary: Generate test audio for a profile voice

text.example: Hola, esta es una prueba de voz.
Hola, esta es una prueba de voz.

post.summary: Upload a voice sample for a specific voice

language_code.description: Override voice language for subsequent generations

404.description: Voice not found or user not authorized

post.summary: Process a voice sample for voice cloning
post.description: Initiates the processing of a voice sample to clone or enhance a voice. This endpoint triggers the voice cloning workflow which includes audio analysis, voice profile creation, and integration with external voice providers like ElevenLabs.

parameters.name: voice
parameters.description: The ID of the voice to process the sample for

parameters.name: voice_sample
parameters.description: The ID of the voice sample to process

404.description: Voice or voice sample not found

403.description: Only admin users can process voice samples

message.example: Only admin users can process voice samples.
